settings.aiEngine.title: Current AI Engine
settings.aiRegenerateGenerated.descripti: Regenerate nodes whose inputs/parameters have not changed (already have «GENERATED» status).
settings.aiRegenerateGenerated.label: Regenerate AI-generated changes
settings.aiRegenerateManual.description: Regenerate nodes that had manual edits after generation, including AI-assisted improvements (have «MANUAL» status).
settings.aiRegenerateManual.label: Regenerate manual changes
settings.autoGenerateSummary.description: Automatically generate a short summary (5–10 words) for plan nodes when content changes.
settings.autoGenerateSummary.label: Auto-summary generation
settings.theme.title: Theme
settings.uiLanguage.title: Interface Language
settings.verboseAiLogging.description: Prints full request headers (API key masked) and body to the server console for every AI API call. Use when diagnosing AI integration issues.
settings.verboseAiLogging.label: Verbose AI request logging
